what_it_does: Implements Deformable Radial Kernel Splatting for shape primitives with learnable radial bases and sharper boundaries.
succinct_summary: Low-to-medium avatar relevance: representation research that may inform high-quality geometry, not a Morgan avatar pipeline.
possible_use: Background reading for future rendering or reconstruction quality improvements.
important_notes: Research code with GPU environment needs; not directly about rigging or Tripo API workflows.
